FROM 19382 TO 02302,~ CONDUCTED IMINT ISO 603 AOC\OP HUMMER SICKLE IYO 41EMD IYO EASTERN MEDITERRANEAN. SEE ISR LINE 1. AT 21472,~WAS REACTED TO BY 1-3 ACFT, INCLUDING lX POSS RFAF SU-30. AT 06162, WAS OFF STATION. AT09342, HANDED BACK TO THE LRE. AT 10252, AT LRCT. AT 0958Z, BEGAN SIGINT COLLECTION. FROM 0958Z TO 2036Z, 1.4a CONDUCTED TARGET DEVELOPMENT ON OP 1.4a ISO 1.4a SEE ISR 1). AT 1514Z, 1.4a OBSERVED 1X UAP (SEE OBSERVATION 1). AT 2036Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 2036Z, 1.4a STOPPED SIGINT COLLECTION. AT 2257Z, HANDED BACK TO THE LRE. FULL MOTION VIDEO WAS EXPLOITED BY DGS1. AT 0004Z, 1.4a LANDED AT 1.4a WITH A LAST ENGINE SHUT-DOWN TIME OF 0014Z. 1.4a 1 IMINT TASKING PROSECUTED, 1.4a HOURS, 1 SIGINT TASKING PROSECUTED, 2 TOTAL TASKINGS PROSECUTED; 1 OBSERVATION (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: REL TO USA, FVEY - Classification Source (MS or Cl

evidence.transcript: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D14 Mission Report Iraq May 2022
evidence.excerpt: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D14 Mission Report Iraq May 2022 Misrep undefined-7561279 Narrative (S//REL) AT 13552,~TOOK OFF FROM SIGONELLA AIRBASE (LIC2). AT 14242,~HANDED OVER FROM THE LRE. ~ COLLECTED SIGINT VIA AIRHANDLER. FROM 15072 TO 09062, AT 15512,~WAS ON STATION IN SRO TRACK (41EMD). FROM 19382 TO 02302,~ CONDUCTED IMINT ISO 603 AOC\OP HUMMER SICKLE IYO 41EMD IYO EASTERN MEDITERRANEAN. SEE ISR LINE 1. AT 21472,~WAS REACTED TO BY 1-3 ACFT, INCLUDING lX POSS RFAF SU-30. SEE AT 01172, ONE POSSIBLE SMALL UAP WAS OBSERVED. SEE UAP LINE 1. AT 00112,! 1.4a!OBSERVED ONE PROBABLE SU-27/35 LANDING IYO AL ASSAD AFLD. SEE AT02302, WAS CLEARED TO RTB. AT 06162, WAS OFF STATION. AT09342, HANDED BACK TO THE LRE. AT 10252, AT LRCT. FMV WAS EXPLOITED BY DGS-IN AND DGS4 LANDED (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION 3.5c, FOIA Exemption (b}(6} iililQUI.JIUiliE. 'J.ilO WA,~~¥ MDR 25-0

FROM 19382 TO 02302,~ CONDUCTED IMINT ISO 603 AOC\OP HUMMER SICKLE IYO 41EMD IYO EASTERN MEDITERRANEAN. SEE ISR LINE 1. AT 21472,~WAS REACTED TO BY 1-3 ACFT, INCLUDING lX POSS RFAF SU-30. AT 06162, WAS OFF STATION. AT09342, HANDED BACK TO THE LRE. AT 10252, AT LRCT. AT 0958Z, BEGAN SIGINT COLLECTION. FROM 0958Z TO 2036Z, 1.4a CONDUCTED TARGET DEVELOPMENT ON OP 1.4a ISO 1.4a SEE ISR 1). AT 1514Z, 1.4a OBSERVED 1X UAP (SEE OBSERVATION 1). AT 2036Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 2036Z, 1.4a STOPPED SIGINT COLLECTION. AT 2257Z, HANDED BACK TO THE LRE. FULL MOTION VIDEO WAS EXPLOITED BY DGS1. AT 0004Z, 1.4a LANDED AT 1.4a WITH A LAST ENGINE SHUT-DOWN TIME OF 0014Z. 1.4a 1 IMINT TASKING PROSECUTED, 1.4a HOURS, 1 SIGINT TASKING PROSECUTED, 2 TOTAL TASKINGS PROSECUTED; 1 OBSERVATION (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION - Classification: SECRET - Associated Caveats: REL TO USA, FVEY - Classification Source (MS or Cl

evidence.transcript: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D14 Mission Report Iraq May 2022
evidence.excerpt: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D14 Mission Report Iraq May 2022 Misrep undefined-7561279 Narrative (S//REL) AT 13552,~TOOK OFF FROM SIGONELLA AIRBASE (LIC2). AT 14242,~HANDED OVER FROM THE LRE. ~ COLLECTED SIGINT VIA AIRHANDLER. FROM 15072 TO 09062, AT 15512,~WAS ON STATION IN SRO TRACK (41EMD). FROM 19382 TO 02302,~ CONDUCTED IMINT ISO 603 AOC\OP HUMMER SICKLE IYO 41EMD IYO EASTERN MEDITERRANEAN. SEE ISR LINE 1. AT 21472,~WAS REACTED TO BY 1-3 ACFT, INCLUDING lX POSS RFAF SU-30. SEE AT 01172, ONE POSSIBLE SMALL UAP WAS OBSERVED. SEE UAP LINE 1. AT 00112,! 1.4a!OBSERVED ONE PROBABLE SU-27/35 LANDING IYO AL ASSAD AFLD. SEE AT02302, WAS CLEARED TO RTB. AT 06162, WAS OFF STATION. AT09342, HANDED BACK TO THE LRE. AT 10252, AT LRCT. FMV WAS EXPLOITED BY DGS-IN AND DGS4 LANDED (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION 3.5c, FOIA Exemption (b}(6} iililQUI.JIUiliE. 'J.ilO WA,~~¥ MDR 25-0

evidence.transcript: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D14 Mission Report Iraq May 2022
evidence.excerpt: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D14 Mission Report Iraq May 2022 Misrep undefined-7561279 Narrative (S//REL) AT 13552,~TOOK OFF FROM SIGONELLA AIRBASE (LIC2). AT 14242,~HANDED OVER FROM THE LRE. ~ COLLECTED SIGINT VIA AIRHANDLER. FROM 15072 TO 09062, AT 15512,~WAS ON STATION IN SRO TRACK (41EMD). FROM 19382 TO 02302,~ CONDUCTED IMINT ISO 603 AOC\OP HUMMER SICKLE IYO 41EMD IYO EASTERN MEDITERRANEAN. SEE ISR LINE 1. AT 21472,~WAS REACTED TO BY 1-3 ACFT, INCLUDING lX POSS RFAF SU-30. SEE AT 01172, ONE POSSIBLE SMALL UAP WAS OBSERVED. SEE UAP LINE 1. AT 00112,! 1.4a!OBSERVED ONE PROBABLE SU-27/35 LANDING IYO AL ASSAD AFLD. SEE AT02302, WAS CLEARED TO RTB. AT 06162, WAS OFF STATION. AT09342, HANDED BACK TO THE LRE. AT 10252, AT LRCT. FMV WAS EXPLOITED BY DGS-IN AND DGS4 LANDED (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION 3.5c, FOIA Exemption (b}(6} iililQUI.JIUiliE. 'J.ilO WA,~~¥ MDR 25-0

FROM 19382 TO 02302,~ CONDUCTED IMINT ISO 603 AOC\OP HUMMER SICKLE IYO 41EMD IYO EASTERN MEDITERRANEAN. SEE ISR LINE 1. AT 21472,~WAS REACTED TO BY 1-3 ACFT, INCLUDING lX POSS RFAF SU-30. AT 06162, WAS OFF STATION. AT09342, HANDED BACK TO THE LRE. AT 10252, AT LRCT. FMV WAS EXPLOITED BY DGS-IN AND DGS4 LANDED (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative Admin CLASSIFICATION 3.5c, FOIA Exemption (b}(6} iililQUI.JIUiliE. 'J.ilO WA,~~¥ MDR 25-0
